message:
🌱 Add linkerd: Implement KEP753 initContainer restartPolicy=Always sidecar mission (#1615)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "linkerd-11461-implement-kep753-initcontainer-restartpolicy-always-sidecar",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "linkerd: Implement KEP753 initContainer restartPolicy=Always sidecar",
+    "description": "Implement KEP753 initContainer restartPolicy=Always sidecar. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current linkerd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your linkerd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nhelm list -n linkerd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working linkerd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review linkerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd\n```\n### What problem are you trying to solve?\n\nNow that we have https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/issues/753 (aka native sidecar containers https://kubernetes.io/blog/2023/08/25/native-sidecar-containers/) can the proxy injector be updated to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Implement KEP753 initContainer restartPolicy=Always sidecar",
+        "description": "Kubernetes has introduced native sidecar support in version 1.28.  This feature improves network proxy sidecar compatability for jobs and initContainers.\n\nIntroduce a new annotation config.alpha.linkerd.io/proxy-enable-native-sidecar and configuration option Proxy.NativeSidecar that causes the\n```yaml\n❯ kubectl get pod nginx-5bf8965ddf-948qs -o yaml | yq '.status.initContainerStatuses[1]'\ncontainerID: containerd://18d6acc27364f8c9118a7fa27dd8bd28f437c65cda3b05f5fdb9e41ec76a9c3d\nimage: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy:stable-2.14.0\nimageID: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy@sha256:8bdf507a00c154b3fa0916acc98d80bfdcb0fb8ca1fa3d1e12cbba82604ef23e\nlastState: {}\nname: linkerd-proxy\nready: true\nrestartCount: 0\nstarted: true\nstate:\n  running:\n    startedAt: \"2023-10-06T19:17:18Z\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade linkerd to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade linkerd:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade linkerd linkerd/linkerd --namespace linkerd\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd\nhelm list -n linkerd\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Implement KEP753 initContainer restartPolicy=Always sidecar\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Kubernetes has introduced native sidecar support in version 1.28.  This feature improves network proxy sidecar compatability for jobs and initContainers.\n\nIntroduce a new annotation config.alpha.linkerd.io/proxy-enable-native-sidecar and configuration option Proxy.NativeSidecar that causes the proxy container to run as an init-container.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "❯ kubectl get pod nginx-5bf8965ddf-948qs -o yaml | yq '.status.initContainerStatuses[1]'\ncontainerID: containerd://18d6acc27364f8c9118a7fa27dd8bd28f437c65cda3b05f5fdb9e41ec76a9c3d\nimage: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy:stable-2.14.0\nimageID: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy@sha256:8bdf507a00c154b3fa0916acc98d80bfdcb0fb8ca1fa3d1e12cbba82604ef23e\nlastState: {}\nname: linkerd-proxy\nready: true\nrestartCount: 0\nstarted: true\nstate:\n  running:\n    startedAt: \"2023-10-06T19:17:18Z\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
